_meta.instrument: Open Enneagram of Personality Scales (OEPS v1.0), Open-Source Psychometrics Project — 한국어 번역
_meta.full_name: Open Enneagram of Personality Scales (OEPS v1.0), Open-Source Psychometrics Project (Korean translation)
_meta.license: Creative Commons per OSPP project policy (About page confirms 'a creative commons license'); the specific BY-NC-SA 4.0 variant is INFERRED from a sibling page and is NOT printed on the OEPS artifacts
_meta.reuse_notes: 한국어 번역(파생물). 비상업 1단계용. LLM 번역이며 검증된 한국어 표준검사가 아님 — 실사용 전 재검수 권장. 라이선스는 원본을 따르되 번역은 파생물이므로 CC-SA/연구용 조건이 그대로 적용됨.
_meta.attribution: Open Enneagram of Personality Scales (OEPS v1.0), Open-Source Psychometrics Project (anonymous author/maintainer). Creative Commons (specific variant not printed on artifacts; treat as BY-NC-SA). · 한국어 번역: deepinme 번역 워크플로우(2026-07, LLM).

scoring_key.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (36 Likert items, 1-5, all positively keyed)
scoring_key.note: Higher summed rating = stronger match to that type; type with highest score is the assigned type.

_meta.cautions: REFERENCE ONLY. 36 Likert items, 4 per type, all positively keyed. Treat as CC NonCommercial+ShareAlike (variant uncertain) → do NOT reproduce/rewrite commercially without confirming the license with the author. Useful as a structural model for authoring ORIGINAL Enneagram items. | 번역본: 문항 순서·채점방향(keyed)·factor/facet은 원본과 동일. text_en에 원문 병기.

translation.method: LLM faithful translation (deepinme workflow, 2026-07) — 충실 번역이며 '쉬운말 리라이팅'은 별도 단계
translation.status: working draft — NOT a validated Korean instrument

qa.reviewer_overall: High-quality translation set. All 36 items (ids 0-35) are present, one per source item. Fidelity is high across the board: measured constructs, directionality, and the first-person self-report frame (나는 …) are preserved, including harder items — 15 (rebels/establishment → 반항하는 쪽/기성 체제), 20 (causal fear-blocks-trust structure), 26 (uninhibited → 거리낌이 없다), 30 (truth over sparing feelings), and 13 (bittersweet → 달콤씁쓸한). Korean reads as natural and idiomatic rather than 번역투, with sensible adaptations (32 그 자리를 떠난다; 10 빼곡하게 계획된 하루). Only one low-severity note: item 22 softens the flat 'I conform' with 편이다. Minor stylistic points elsewhere (17 몰두한다 adds slight intensity vs. 'spend hours') are within acceptable range and not errors. No mistranslations or meaning reversals found.

issues.problem: 'I conform.' is a flat self-assertion, but 나는 주변에 순응하는 편이다 adds a hedge (편이다 = 'tend to'), slightly inconsistent with the bare-assertion framing used elsewhere (e.g., 0 완벽주의자다, 23 충직하다). Very minor; does not shift the measured construct since the response scale captures degree.

verification.summary: 번역 QA(2차 에이전트): fidelity=high, naturalness=natural, count_match=True, issues=1

items.text: 나는 완벽주의자다.
items.text_en: I am a perfectionist.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — no per-page notice; see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 효율성을 추구한다.
items.text_en: I strive for efficiency.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 다른 사람이 한 일을 다시 해야 할 때가 많다.
items.text_en: I often have to redo other peoples work.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 내 물건을 잘 정돈해 둔다.
items.text_en: I keep my belongings in order.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나에게 삶에서 가장 중요한 것은 다른 사람들과의 관계다.
items.text_en: My relationships with others are what my life is about.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 거절하는 것을 어려워한다.
items.text_en: I have difficulty saying no.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 다른 사람이 목표를 이루도록 돕는 데서 큰 만족을 느낀다.
items.text_en: I get lots of satisfaction from helping others achieve their goals.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 가족을 최우선으로 생각한다.
items.text_en: I put family first.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 일을 최우선으로 생각한다.
items.text_en: I put work first.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 남들 사이에서 돋보이는 것을 좋아한다.
items.text_en: I like to stand out.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 할 일이 빼곡하게 계획된 하루로 아침을 맞는 것이 좋다.
items.text_en: It is good to wake up to a full day of planned activities.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 돈은 내 행복에 중요하다.
items.text_en: Money is important to my happiness.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 사랑에 빠져 있는 상상에 잠기곤 한다.
items.text_en: I daydream about being in love.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 달콤씁쓸한 감정을 느끼는 것을 정말 즐긴다.
items.text_en: I really enjoy feeling bitter sweet.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 운다.
items.text_en: I cry.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 기성 체제보다 반항하는 쪽의 편을 든다.
items.text_en: I side with the rebels over the establishment.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 감정을 드러내는 것을 어려워한다.
items.text_en: I have a hard time showing emotions.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 혼자서 취미에 몇 시간씩 몰두한다.
items.text_en: I spend hours alone with my hobbies.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 대부분의 시간을 무언가를 이해하려 애쓰는 데 쓴다.
items.text_en: I spend most of my time trying to understand things.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 지적인 도전을 좋아한다.
items.text_en: I like mental challenges.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 이용당할지도 모른다는 두려움 때문에 나는 남을 더 신뢰하지 못한다.
items.text_en: Fear of being taken advantage of keeps me from being more trusting.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 결정을 내리기 전에 다른 사람들의 의견을 구한다.
items.text_en: I get input from others before I make a decision.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 주변에 순응하는 편이다.
items.text_en: I conform.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 충직하다.
items.text_en: I am loyal.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 늘 새로운 경험을 해야만 한다.
items.text_en: I must always be having new experiences.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 누구와도 어떤 주제로든 대화를 이어갈 수 있다.
items.text_en: I can keep a conversation going with anyone about anything.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 거리낌이 없다.
items.text_en: I am uninhibited.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 늘 재치 있는 농담으로 긴장을 풀려고 한다.
items.text_en: I always try to break the tension with a good joke.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 자연스럽게 리더로 나서게 된다.
items.text_en: I naturally emerge as a leader.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 아무도 의견이 일치하지 않는 대화를 좋아한다.
items.text_en: I like a conversation where no one agrees.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 사람들이 내 기분을 배려하기보다 있는 그대로 사실을 말해 주기를 바란다.
items.text_en: I want people to tell me the truth, not spare my feelings.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 리더가 결단력 있을 때가 더 좋다.
items.text_en: I prefer it when leaders are decisive.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 다른 사람들이 말다툼을 하면 나는 그 자리를 떠난다.
items.text_en: When other people are arguing, I leave the room.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 문제를 일으키지 않으려고 내 생각을 속으로만 담아 둔다.
items.text_en: I keep my thoughts to myself, to prevent trouble.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 매우 수용적이고 유연하다.
items.text_en: I am very accepting and flexible.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.text: 나는 대립을 피한다.
items.text_en: I avoid confrontation.
items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)
